staleness_rules.orphan: no caller; no tests; no CLI; no issue (deletion candidate)
staleness_rules.scaffolding: no caller; owned by an open canonical issue (pending wiring)
staleness_rules.staling: no caller anywhere; built/tested or has a CLI verb; no open issue (wire or retire)
